'''Gerrard V''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]<ref name="EAOC" /> and the site of a [[Liberation of Gerrard V|battle]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="RS I" />

==History==
[[File:Gerardv_1.jpg|thumb|left|250px|A city on Gerrard V.]]
The [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Gerrard V was found in the [[Gerrard system/Legends|Gerrard system]] at [[Galactic coordinates/Legends|galactic coordinates]] K-12.<ref name="EAOC" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Gerrard V was represented in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Chelo]],<ref name="GNN3" /> although the planet was populated by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] supporters.<ref name="RS I guide" />

More than [[0 ABY/Legends|six]] [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Gerrad V's [[Unidentified Imperial governor (Gerrard V)|governor]] used his [[Yacht/Legends|yachts]] to pillage Gerrard V's major [[City/Legends|city]].<ref name="RS I guide" /> The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] rushed to [[Liberation of Gerrard V|engage]] the yachts, sending [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], along with [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]], to disable the yachts. During the liberation, Rogue Squadron was intercepted by the [[128th TIE Interceptor Squadron]]. After defeating the 128th, Imperial Pilot [[Kasan Moor]], a [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/In interceptor]] pilot, defected to the Rebel Alliance after her TIE Interceptor was disabled.<ref name="RS I" />

Rebel pilot [[Grizz Frix/Legends|Grizz Frix]] was involved in an accident during training over the planet.<ref name="Frix DB">{{DB|character|grizzfrix|Frix, Grizz}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Gerrard V was first mentioned in in [[Galaxywide NewsNets]] in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3]], and later appeared in a campaign mission in the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']].
